Name: Mission: Impossible – The Final Reckoning
Review: Christopher McQuarrie has outdone himself with this action-packed thriller. He balanced fight scenes and thrilling moments, with calmness which was resulted to a wonderful  experience. The storyline unfolds beautifully every 20 minutes, with an amazing screenplay. The film's locations are well-chosen, and the characters, led by Tom Cruise, deliver outstanding performances with mature emotional depth. The background music by Max Aruj & Alfie Godfrey is exceptional, with new scores introduced in every scene. As always, the stunt scenes are impressive, making this film a must-watch in theaters. Tom Cruise truly brings Ethan to life.

Name: Tourist Family
Review: Abishan Jeevinth's latest film is a heartwarming family entertainer! Although the storyline isn't groundbreaking, the movie shines with its emotional depth and peaceful atmosphere. Every emotion is carefully crafted, making for an amazing viewing experience. The standout aspect? The incredible screen presence! Each character brings their own moral compass, adding authenticity to the story. "Mulli" stole the show for me - his comedy scenes had me in stitches! 😂❤️ This movie beautifully portrays the importance of happiness and trust. I'm gutted I missed it in theaters, but it's definitely worth watching!!! ❤️👍🏼

Name: Ready or Not
Review: Just watched a good horror-thriller movie by Matt Bettinelli-Olpin and Tyler Gillett! The way they wove myths into the storyline is amazing. And can we give it up for the MC? She absolutely crushed it! 😘💥

Name: Perfect Days
Review: Well I don't know where to start. Tbh there are no enough words that can be described about this film. Anyways, I think this is the most beautiful movie i have ever seen across all the languages. I have watched anime and stuffs but it belongs to series. So, this is the first Japanese movie i have ever watched in my entire life and i didn't expect that I learned so many things from this film that could help me in real life to make it better. The visuals and sound-track has more presence than dialogues in this film. I thought it would be boring, turns out I experienced many of the wonderful things and it still attracts me a lot. The man “Hirayama” dominated the entire film by doing nothing 🥹🌟. His smile and emotions spoke a lot than his words but at the end he still attracted me with those games and emotional talk. The pleasent musics in between were so good. One thing is certain every day begins with new life and it has it's own reason. 🎵 “new dawn”🎵 🎵“new life”🎵 🎵“new happiness ”🎵 Literally the best movie that I watched in this year!! Definitely a must watch film... 🥹😭❤️

Name: The Killer
Review:
Tbh this film tested my patience a lot I mean this film can be understood in two methods. 

  1) when he missed the target he actually ran away instead of 2nd attempt and that sounded like a smart move before you know his family would be in trouble. But after he gets to know he realises that's his mistake so he gotta clean it up by killing em all.

  2) when he missed the target he actually ran away instead of 2nd attempt and that sounded like a smart move before you know his family would be in trouble. According to this method's pov he actually wanted to save his family which denotes his mission and his family are not related unless they threaten. So he killed em all without a trace.

Followed by these two points he actually needed a proper evidence to kill them. He obviously doesn't care about those people after all the mess were happened. I mean each character were so lowkey but his presence of mind helped him to dodge the whole mess that could've happened. Unlike other killers he doesn't want to end up like the way it started. He needs a proper shit to close all of em without any trace. So I liked this film personally but they could have come up with a better fucking reason. Have some fucking patience while watching this film...

My mind was set this is gonna be a pakka entertainment. But, later it became more serious when karthi really fell in love with her. This film is also based on some caste fighting ruckus and I made up a story in my head that it's gonna be happy ending and tbh I thought this film is a romantic and perfect entertainer with some action sequences but they literally had me in the last 15 mins. This film made me depressed like why tf why it should happen and they actually made me cryyy like i started assuming myself as karthi. It just really broke my heart and still I feel terrible that their happiness faded away like nothing and I'm still mad at karthi for leaving her 😭😭😭. “Vazhanum nu aasa pattu vandhavana vasalaye vechu anuparinga” moment !!! Those who didn't witness this masterclass please free yourself and have a visit to paruthiveeran. Try not to cry at the end guys !!! 😭🥺💔

Name: Swades
Review:
This film is totally amazing and I wanna convey something important through this film. Well This film contains two sides :-

The brighter side shows about the journey and happiness of Mohan by meeting his Mother Ms. Kaveri , love of his life Gita , The postman (also fighter), The tourists (also chef) and every other village people. He studied the land and the people by having a wonderful time with them. At one point he forgot that he was a guest. They have shown that how Mohan showed his love to his mother and the care from his side was totally heartwarming. So, this was the brighter side.

The darker side is the main thing which actually shows the importance of the film and it portrays about many problems like illiteracy, poverty and some other stuffs. By showing these things in this film do they want to convey that they are opposing to that and all ? absolutely NOT. They want to break the system and re-start it. Even in this generation some people have a mentality like Men should work Women should be a home maker. Stop normalizing these first. Apart from jokes you should not normalize this kind off activity. Like this it cuts most of the population's learning and ideology. This is an example , like these there are many things which has been normalized since our grandparents generation. I'm not acting like a tough guy or feminist here. They do not deserve this criticism and also for poor people. yea I'm speaking about the people who worked hard day and night for growing of food that we are eating here 3 times a day. still they are also a percent. The thing what Mohan actually did is the 1 % of change. Some might say we can talk from here but we can't do shit. yes of course but at least we should give some respect , at least we should not rob them or manipulate them for our own needs whether politicians or whoever it is. 

So this is the thing  that I wanted to deliver. Apart from that it was a great film and for Mohan his fate and love towards the people lives in CHARANPUR. Find yours too....

Mark Ruffalo and Jake gyllenhaal's interaction in the last hour was pretty nervous and interesting. I guess robert jr deserves a better role than this. The reveal was quite unexpected and I guessed at one moment, yet couldn't confirm since the screen play portrayed peak suspicious for all the characters and even at one point I suspected Mark Ruffalo. So yea they had me in that twist. I would say The Timeline thing played a magnificent role, some might believe that this was actually a negative thing. For me it's a plus and the duration was a bit lengthy. Anyways it's a Great work by Fincher NGL... 🔥🛐

Most importantly they didn't waste any of the characters and they went it through based on terrorism and politics of the terrorism so idw spoil any of these in my log. Definitely it's a theatre watch and just don't hesitate it is a lengthy film. Can't wait for 19/03/2026.

Moves the story and screen play through his villanism it's just crazy. Another Potential all rounder like VJS. Plot and screen play both were awesome still some scenes could've shortened. Only thing which disappointed me is priority to love. Gomma rendu duet song laa ena maithuku ne therlaa 😭😭😭. Idhula adharva vera mama Vela pakaran and ofc I wouldn't expect his death would create an impact. Dialogues were well written but neraya censor pantanga adha konjam sad ah Iruku. And also the cameos were quite interesting but en savadicha impact irukum nu evan sona therla waste pantanga adhuvum Rana dagubati ah , gommala bahubali la avaru ila na padam ey ila da 😭😭. Songs towards the protest was good ana indha Gvp love songs kondu vandhu mediocre akitan album ah loosu payan. So that's all and last but not the least :- "LONG LIVE TAMIL" 🪧✊ "LONG LIVE TAMIL" 🪧✊ "LONG LIVE TAMIL" 🪧✊

Name: Meesaya Murukku
Review:
Deep down it's not just an ordinary film, we realise that we came across so many things with or without maturity. But the fact is choosing the passion over studies will show you, what our future actually looks like which solves the question with this film “Meesaya Murukku”. There are three phases :
Phase - 1 : banger intro, school life, college life, fun x 100, friends, etc... Phase - 2 : studies, love, fun x 100 misunderstanding, insult, chaos, mass, passion, etc... Phase - 3 : harsh reality, friendship, independent, survival, decision making, advice, break up, etc...
Out of these three phases phase-2 is the scarier one which was root of phase-3 and at the age of 20 while I'm watching it i slowly getting the point of Vivek's every single word and piece of advice. Tbh I wanted to re-watch this film for fun but when it goes scene by scene it scared me more. One thing is sure I'm thankful to my current situation since neither I got love nor a passion so yea it's just not that much heavy still i gotta do smtng. Seri boomer content pogudhu na idhoda en review va mudichikaren byeee... 🏃‍♂️🏃‍♂️🏃‍♂️

Name: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
Review: I get it charlie, no one sees the world like you do. Not to exaggerate but I feel he's my sensitive version. The sad part is he can't be like other people who naturally exists. He's like a person who can show his happiness and peace only if you talk to him. I'm not gonna judge him but being introvert is not easyyy. But he's beyond introvert and I love it coz charlie being charlie. People who had experienced a trauma or being alone can able to find the right people in future... ❤️☝️

Name: Django Unchained
Review: Ohhh Mr. Quentin Tarantino, What was that huhhh !? I said kill Bill was my fav Tarantino film and now this film Django Unchained will be my all time favourite QT film EVERRR. The story was absolutely crushed and those cow-boy & bounty hunting vibes was really enjoyable. One thing you cannot deny in QT's film, which is nothing but blood splashing, it's like the rain droplets bouncing of the floor. In kill Bill it was soo goofy but here it's more like classic and i like it. The mixture of emotions has always been a great plus in QT's film. The subtle point of his direction is you couldn't figure out till the half way between what he actually expects and what he delivers. And, that's where the work of Tarantino shines. Really a fan of his work and if you want to enjoy his film you must have enormous amount of patience to witness his art. I'm actually a big fan of songs and back ground scores in this film. The lyrics were too perfect and the sync was next level. Starting of ‘ohh django’ to ‘always cool, he's the best’ Man it's simply terrific. Each characters were properly utilised, especially the protoganists jamie foxx and ofc another promising film about vengeance and slavery. It's always a good combo and I don't recognise that I ever watched that kinda movies, but it is so nicee. So yeaa a great film, more like a journey for revenge which was so satisfying and I love it. Absolute cinema by Quentin Tarantino.

Review:

He  carried the trauma on his back at every situation during the war, which was not easy and after all those tragedy's he regretted that he could've died with them rather than watching them burning alive. Not only that he also recognized how his Mother and two sisters were dead.

All he can do is react to those unfair shit because burning 626 innocent villagers just coz they are helping the partisans. I am not sure about the numbers but those people where innocent civilians. It was happened coz of HITLER, even if he didn't intend to do it still, it falls on him. It was his ideology and policy to spread the terrorism.

 It was a total disaster and nightmare to people who represent the Belarus. Never watching this again!!! (Coz I had enough)

Name: The Hunt
Review:
Well I've seen the most unfair that could ever happen to a man. A respectable man like lucas getting these type of allegations just because a little girl said. It looks stupid and i mean who would believe those from a kid !? I would blame the parents, fighting all day for nothing but taking care of her daughter. From that she assumed something stupid and Outta nowhere she blame lucas for this. Soo unfairrrr. 

Lucas is like a guardian to her, taking care of her in and out of kindergarten like a real father. And he gets the accusation of molesting people. On the other hand, his son Marcus who faced the same issue like lucas did on every place. He carried his father's burden on everywhere as a teenager justifying that lucas is not like that. Even he was beaten up so bad by lucas's friendsjust coz he asked klara the truth. 

It's just crazy that how he survived the tough period. Nobody believed him, even his best friend, poor Lucas knocking on every door and begging for the justice and support. His best friend pushed him out of his house. You know how scary that was!? It broke my heart. He could not able to live a normal life that he wanted to live. All his neighbourhood hurting him by their distance treatment and Theo was informing all the stores and shops like do not allow LUCAS to buy anything, he's a molester. It's not normal.

The saddest part is he forgave everyone including Klara and Theo, even though his awesome smile and happiness was shattered. I hate GREATHE more than Klara. Sadist bitch, bastard, immature illiterate, etc... not enough words is there to describe her Character. He lost his dog just coz Klara lied. OMG this is making me Sick. 

I'm stopping my review here and i strictly do not encourage these type of films. That's why I gave 4 stars (I'm being honest). I'm very sensitive to these type of films, even it hurts so much while reviewing this film. Being lucas is equal to living in a hell while alive. I hope it should not happen to anyone in real life. Such a disaster... 💔🙏

Name: Little Women
Review: The fact that amy became more wise and mature than jo is shocking. It's nice that they showed about women's side of happiness and struggle during civil war. Enjoyed the bonding of sisters, it's kinda new to me. Also Emma, you are so beautiful. 😭😘

Name: Jana Nayagan
Review:
Finally I've watched it. So let me dive into my review... 

NGL the plot was more promising and good even though u saw it on many films it still gives a enthusiasm to watch it. The character “Thalapathy Vetri Kondan” stood out on one side, absolute fire bro. Whether you take action scenes or flashbacks. With those terrific background scores it was so goated. Mamitha also done her role well. I deeply agree that this Film should be A certified unlike coolie, bcoz the violents or nudity they've done according to it. Few diaglouges were censored still it was worth it for an adult film. These are positive points.

In negative side, they fumbled the screen play so badd. It's like all of a sudden everything was happening and after a moment it was gone. Suppose if you went to pee for a moment without passing, after that u would see a scene which wasn't relevant to previous scene and there is a difference between non-linear & non-relevant. Few scenes were rushed and few were felt unnecessary.

I've seen salaar, I've seen kgf but this kinda build up was too much. I could hear a lot of explanations like bro last film bro, bro it's vijay bro, blah blah blah. Honestly speaking if they went on seperate way to move the plot and screen play without the kesari shit it would've been a w film for sure. It's a potential good film ruined with the inspiration of kesari. That's all I can say... 

So I'm ending my review here and once again Thalapathy's acting was so goated, action scenes kept me in the edge of my seat. Wonder why they wanna do extra build up for Anna's film. If not Thalapathy I would prolly given 1 star. Built a great empire. Happy Farewell Vj naa...👋❤️

Name: Cinema Paradiso
Review: I Thank God for making me to love the cinema at its fullest. Cinema Paradiso isn't just a film or a theatre, it is a Golden memory which was sculptured to every person who loved the cinema at every time and every emotion. In the same way it was sculptured in my heart. I could see my boy Toto enjoying his film in theatres with tears after 30 fucking years. The moment I realised when Toto didn't come back for 30 years just bcoz a man said. Yea I'm talking about the God “Mr. Alfredo”. What an impeccable character he is. The bond between Toto and Alferedo can't be described in enough words. The reason why Toto never regretted that his father wasn't there with him is Alfredo. Alfredo was a great story teller that it even worked out for Toto finding his love. But it just disappeared. Every movie has a scene that leaves an indelible mark. For me, it's not the love story. It's the end of Alfredo, and Toto's regret for not being there in his final days. The cinema, a symbol of cherished memories, getting destroyed right before Toto's eyes, is a painful reminder of the transience of life. But, they only remembered the golden time of their life visiting Cinema Paradiso which was sculptured in their hearts forever. Absolute Cinema. I love Alfredo. I love Toto. I love Cinema. I love Cinema Paradiso.... ❤️‍🩹🫂 Rip Alfredo 🕊️

Name: The Shining
Review:
I wouldn't say it's fully horror, A modern Masterpiece of Horror + Thriller. Let me dive into the review :- Not every film gets the proper detailing, if it also gets it may foreshadow or they would leave us to make our thoughts or make theories. But Stanley Kubrick said Nuh uh. Man each & every detail was accurate as fuck which creates a huge amount of curiosity to make us watch it even more fascinated. It was a slow start indeed but the way the film moves into deep and the horror part was slowly arrived, we came to know that it has started. I missed jump scares a lot. I mean there is a twist and turn. But, nothing beats jump scares. Also, each characters were more scarier than the actual ghosts. When the family was arrived, something was fishy and also the guy danny is more sus than the hotel. On the other hand, I doubted it why torrence took the history of that hotel so easily and before they arrive danny already knew it something's gonna happen. By the time he was resting his mum informed the doctor about danny's injury, turns out it's a tragedy called should dislocation. Srsly??? 😭😭😭 He's like 6 or 7 ( 67 ) how could he face shit like that idk. From that moment I started to panicking for no shit. Thank god danny was saved. Also mah guy Tony, he's literally the smartest one in the room. Saved danny and his mum. Man that guy danny deserves an Oscar. Even in my present I can't talk those dialogues in a perfect state like him. Everything about danny in the film was so cool. His motor cycle was Omfggg I love it and the pov while he riding it was literally Peak Male content ahhh moment. The Bartender in this film was more familiar to me and his subtle expression reminds me something terrible, like have I ever saw this scary face. Later Mr. TORRENCE meets MR. GRADY omfgg when Torrence found Grady was the old care taker. I was like holyyy shitt, epic face off but their exchange of words made them work as a team and I was shouting like Run Wendyyy Run Dannyyy. Suddenly it went like Dannyy is inside, I'm tonyyy Omfggg this is cinemaaaa. 😭🔥 Jack Torrence was honorable mention guys. His role was quite impressive, his behaviour, his character, his expressions made him more scary and he is the guy who easily falls on trap by ghosts. But idk why he walks slowly when he chases danny, ik he got hit by Wendy and fell from the steps. But this much detailing and realistic is just crazyyy. The worst part was Dick Halloran's death man flew from nowhere and came to check on them to get a hit by an axe in chest. Flaws in this film :- 1. Was expecting a horrific flashback totally rather than showing it on danny's thoughts. 2. Character like Dick Halloran should not be wasted like this. He deserves even more time in this film. 3. They wasted the last epic 20 mins by chasing. Atleast they could've hurted Wendyy or danny. If not hurting atleast trapping one of them would be better actually. Idk but Stanley wants them to escape. These are the flaws... But here the twist i would like to convey what I experienced irl while watching it. Before that forgive me for the 67 meme. 🙏🙏🙏
Me :- Atleast the story ends. Stanley :- Nooooo look at the photo. Me :- What photo??? Stanley :- Look, GRADY was not there, it wasss Torrence. Me :- What ?? Is he the one who killed Grady, his wife and his two daughters. Stanley :- suit yourself coz my job is over. Me :- What the hell mann??😭😭
The end. Ada ponga da 😭🙏

Name: Official Secrets
Review:
Omggg I love thesee type of films. The sad part is it was soo underrated.

Katherine Gun you are truly a fighter.  Despite being an anti war women she released the secret without a hesitation just coz she doesn't want people in Iraq to die. I'm pretty damn sure she wasn't aware or strategically done anything knowing the war was illegal. After all she's a naive person. 

But, she was ready to fight for anything and for that she was ready to face those charges coz of Official secrets Act on 1989 and she said she was not guilty. Damn too much goosebumps and the opposite lawyer just withdrawn the case. I liked it but they could've extended the scene. 

I was about to flip out, coz the GCHQ's motive regarding the memo was simply like a dog hiding when it saw blue cross. Just coz they were ignorant about something sensitive, that doesn't mean it won't create a ruckus. They should've involved in it before the publishers or press involves into it. It was so stupid to see it.

One thing I hated it so much which was keira knigtley's face fat. She was sexyy in atonement but here she looks like a poor pity women. Deporting her husband while her women facing case was sooo british...

It's a nice film fellas. Just go for it...

You know it's all same post different captions, but unlike college they focused on school days. (School was nice) 🥲🙏

Ken Karunaas did a good job in his first film as a lead role and also Suraj role was emotionally strong. But no one could beat Devadarshni. Prolly the best character of this film, created such an impact throughout this film by being innocent and a great Mom for Ken a.k.a Praveen. 

Ig the love part was just to drag the film, although the character kanaga was more promising. Promising to whom?  film ? Nah!!! It's ken again. Podanayoda thattu thatti pocha muditu padi da ngradha indirect ah sona madhiri irunchu. But ken was matured enough to understand what's the reality and I liked it, it's more like i could relate it. Name: There Will Be Blood
Review:
Everyone talking about PTA's Cinematography but no one's talking about Daniel day lewis's performance. I'm being honest it would've been an avg film if Daniel's presence wasn't there. That's why he got the oscar and PTA didn't or may be he directed particularly for DDL.

DDL isn't adapting to the story, the story was adapted to DDL's acting and presence. Bro was literally standing like, I'm the one who built this empire and I'm the third revolutionaryyy, ooommfgg peak capitalism. 

The title was chosen coz he sees his work as his own thing, closest to heart and if someone bothers it or tried to break the bond or ruin the business THERE WILL BE BLOOD. It might be my theory but the way I understood like this makes me happy. 

And, ofc it's a slow burner guys it took me so long to complete this film not bcoz it's slow I was busy at some point, so I couldn't get time to watch it in a stretch. Still it's a slow burner. But this is a good film and ppl who loves western films, might find this interesting besides how the time goes.

I'm satisfied that ELI deserved the best Death by Daniel plainview, made him cry and feel miserable, begging for life and killed him. Ohhh myy god peak cinemaaa. The climax was perfect!

“Bastard from Basket” so mean and cool !

Name: Ayan
Review: "Pyramids can be built again, but not this" ahh film. 🔥✋ I'm re-watching this after a very long time. Still, from the start till end, the film kept me at the edge of the seat. You can come up with any type of films but KVA pulled such a goated commerical. Omfgggg Suryaaa was 10/10. Like, he was the perfect fit for this film, I mean his acting, his slang, his accent, his physique, his body language everything was perfect. It also supports the moral values of emotions that lifts up each character to push the film forward. While I was watching it i realised they don't used to take this type of films, it disappoints me a lot. I mean even though we adapted to those films still I miss a pakka commercial film like Ayan. Speaking about Ayan omg everything was perfect not good or great, it was perfect. Whether you take plot, cinematography, background scores, songs, character usage, etc... And I'm positive that it was Surya's prime days. So yea this film deserves it's worth. Idk why Some film claims that it was commercial, but it wasn't feeling enough. Either they attack us with slow burners or it will be any other telugu overhyped crap. Not to be offensive but it is the reality. But ayan was above the par and I love it. I could watch it any day...

But Denis went too far by presenting the best fiction in Hollywood industry. Ts is soo Peak. I'm gonna control my hand or else I'm gonna type it like 8-10 paragraph. Peak cinematography, visuals, sound effects, etc... I'm gonna regret if I don't watch Dune-3 on Imax. All hail the Duke of Arrakis 🙇‍♂️.

Name: Karuppu
Review: SURYA IS BACKK Y'ALL... This film will definitely reach all the people who waited for Surya's comeback and God devotees. RJB pulled a great commercial film and he worked so hard for this. So it must be a success for him and a feast for his fans. Congrats Rj !!! ❤️‍🔥 Talking about the film it was absolutely peakkk, Surya literally dominated the film. I felt like I witnessed the real Karuppan in the climaxxx. I ran out of words and voice at that moment. My mind was silent, just admiring the beauty and emotion of the god. Interval scene laam ommala thooki soruvudhu!!!! fight, transition, background scores everything was fucking peakkk. Also speaking about Background scores and songs, Sai abhyankar is literally cooked so hardddd. Ig Ani gonna have some trouble in the future. Elaam bgm um mashup aagi odinee irukuu da ebha... 😮‍💨 There are also some Good references in this film which keeps the audience entertained and I couldn't take my eyes off. This is the greatest plus point. when it comes to action and emotions audience be travelling at here and there. Suddenly a comedy reference or a trendy joke pops up to make a quick distract to entertainthe audience and balancing the film even better. That's RJB for you... Even in acting he literally aced the villain role. According to the showdown they presented how maximum a man can try to win against a god without superpowers. A pakka corporate Villain. Also Trisha is also back and in recent films she was acted some kinda shit roles and made me hate her so bad, but in this film her acting was good. Ipa Karuppan ah pathi pesuvom, I always believe in God and when I was witnessing it my belief and emotion towards the God was literally infinite. I was just blah blah blah couldn't even do a single expression like being happy or sad or suprised or shocked or whatever idk a fucking thing it was a complete best silent moment. I shouted for surya like a madman but when Karuppan appears it was absolutely a speechless moment watching him dancing and hunting the bad people, the rhythm, song, atmosphere everything was Marvelous. Apdiye horse mela eri varan ketavangala vetta it was kinda a nostalgic moment or Paati sonna kadha apdi dha irunchu. I literally enjoyed as much as I could... Second part ku Lead onu irukum ana spoiler alavuku adhula onum ila just it's a avg lead which it's gonna come after years. But the movie is just Peakkkkk. It's a fucking Theatre watch and do not miss it... — Karuppan Varan Vazhi Maraikadhe!!! 🙇‍♂️

Name: Oblivion
Review: — I'm Jack Harper and I'm home!!

Name: The Long Walk
Review:
500+ Miles ?? Seriously ?? Brooo how do those four guys Survived that much !? But shout to all who joined this life or death challenge.

This director is kinda new to me ( first film) 
so I thought I could give a try for it. The plot may feel kinda boring but the screen play, he did a wonderful job. He gave more importance to the characters & dialogues that makes a lot of difference. We all might a hate a character at minimum cost at a start for no reason. so if you hate em, you feel sad for them at one point even though you hated them at the start. 

Ray & Pete is the friendship that everyone has been dying for irl. They had a great conversation which includes fun talk, emotional talk, motivating each other,etc... their bonding said a lot of things by only seeing their Convo. 

I forgot few names coz it doesn't fit in my mind, but some wanted to die because they reached their maximum and this is the fate. So I'm proud of them and Also the last 3rd guy who was eliminated before Ray was literally a surprise and I felt pity for him when he said I wanna ask my dad to take me to his home. Touched my heart and I wanted him to win. After the conversation he gave up and died. That's what makes it difficult it's just not only physical or fitness kinda thing, it's about how much you are mentally strong to survive this challenge.

Pete is the best character guys, he doesn't have any back stories or traumatic experience but he do have the best aim compared to others and ig that's what made him more passionate and guts to accept this challenge. I accept, at one point he wanted his friend Ray to win but the tables has turned. Bro won, but at what cost !?? 😭💔

Still he got Ray's revenge but it was a sad ending. I wouldn't say the ending was a tragedy, it's just fucking rules and I hate it....

Name: Thalapathi
Review: Thalapathi is a film which I don't wanna forget in my entire life. It's my Fav Rajnikanth's film till now. Ig it won't be changing. It's my 2nd re watch. On my first watch I just saw this as a commercial film. On second time, I had a rough day at that time so I was scrolling youtube randomly, it was in the recommendation and I watched it. And today, I watched it coz I want to travel with emotions through a film and i want to be happy. Each time after watching it, there will be a 3 year gap, like first watch was 2020, second watch was 2023 and third watch is 2026. Avalo neraiva Iruku indha padam. Oru sila padam pathute iruka thonum, oru sila padam 1 time pathadhe neraiva irukum. Adhula oru padam dhan idhu. Mammootty & Rajni's friendship can't be described with enough words. It's the best thing in the whole film. Ofc Ilayaraja dominated the music & bgm part. But apart from all of these i wanna talk about Mani Ratnam's writing. Mani Ratnam doesn't write or direct a film randomly. He has a purpose and that purpose leads the way to understand the film. When it comes to his work it will be a Circle and that's really genius. The balancing emotions for friend and his Mom was too much goosebumps & tears. Epo pathalum Azha vechiruvaaru pa, adhan Mani Ratnam. 🥹🥀 The sad part is they are not taking this type of films right now, we are watching something new and refreshing. I agree some of the films are good and some of them are trashy but we don't feel bad or “i wanna criticise the film” back in the days. It's just the time, is changing so fast and whatever they come up, they can't beat the classic one. I'm happy I chose to watch Thalapathi Today...☺️🤍

Name: Past Lives
Review: The Maturity is you realise when Nora holded her tears until Hae Sung left. More like the walk of happy tears. I respect Hae Sung, it's not easy to be like him! :)), This film is literally a bittersweet song or you can even say it's a poem...

Name: Marty Supreme
Review: I finally understood why Timotheè Chalamet deserves an Oscar, fantastic acting. He was literally carried the whole show with his presence and how the character lives through the society after all those disrespects. Despite all of that I really wanna talk about the film. We all know it's a medicore film in absence of Timotheè Chalamet. The story starts with the game that he's been so passionate about it and suddenly he was pushed away coz he lost in the finals and the tables were totally turned. Then the film moves about the survival part of Marty Mauser. He was treated like shit and lost all the respect. I agree his attitude & way of speaking felt so cocky and the market is so bigger than any sport. But I wish he was treated well in the first place atleast by a group that owes him a lot. Literally the film portrays one vs world. They could've come up with more games and inner politics in it rather than brand expansion. But it's just Survival stages of Marty Mauser. At the end of the day he literally saved the film with his acting. Otherwise it is medicore at its best...

Name: Wonder
Review: Happy Tears are Worth it.. Today, I was really upset about few things and I couldn't tolerate it. I wanted to be relieved, happy, sad at one time. So, I decided to watch a movie and I chose Wonder. Wonder is a film which makes you feel mentally strong no matter how bad you were hurt or feel. They say everyone deserves a respect, but what wonder taught me is everyone deserves a love. Not everyone borns with a defect. If someone does he have to struggle with this whole life. But, here it was just starting trouble. When it goes on and on, everything becomes easy. I noticed one thing which was very beautiful & sad at the same time. Everyone has their own reasons to act accordingly in a particular situation. If someone can't accept the fact or they doesn't know what happened just pretend to be everything is alright and it wasn't me who ignored blah blah blah whatever. The Mirror has two sides so if ppl notices one side of the person they are not interested in knowing about the other side just because they can't accept their first side. If they get to face the second side of a person's face they are soo lucky but for that luck you need to take some effort. People always need space to realise and overcome their problems. Everyone has their own life and a story to move upon. They were not acting or pretending to be tough. If we really care about them, it's our duty to talk to them. That's how a bond works. There is a connection among all the children or teenagers or adult. They don't wanna expose or open up to each other if something is not alright. You are sharing your bad experience to your new friend why can't you share it with your real friend you had the bad experience with. Sometimes it's alright coz they are kids. And, at the same time they have the potential to learn the real bonding & love towards friendship. Not only this wonder taught me many things like facing the bully, how it feels to be left alone, do you love the reality, how it feels to let you talk so the other person can listen, etc ... When a person sees something new that makes him/her happy, they proceed with that thing frequently. That's how you make yourself happy & comfortable. The society sucks a lot, but you have your own people to understand you. They are ready to accept what you are. Who cares about other people opinion who doesn't give a shit about you. You are always noted. You are always cared. You are always blessed. It doesn't matter how you feel about other people's words. You have to care about your people who knows you very much and stand for you at anytime. Remember everything I have & everything IAM is yours. If you ever notice this line from any person who talking to you is either will be your Mom, dad or your future partner. You always get a true appreciation when you matter around your friends. It's your own surrounding and there is nothing to be afraid of facing the world. The world is big and you definitely will be considered as favourite and jovial. You don't have to be a hero or a main character. Be a character who makes everyone laugh and keeps the surrounding entertained. One day I will be that guy and that's my destiny too. I'm happy that I could relate a lot to this movie. The characters, dialogues, emotional depth, acting, bgm everything was perfect and for me i really love this film at my fullest. I've watched a film called "The perks of being a wall flower” and the direction is Stephen who directed Wonder too. Ig he wants to say something even more to this world and I'm ready to listen everything. Just Remember You are a Wonder! ❤️

Name: Reservoir Dogs
Review:
Before judging my movie taste with the rating, I really wanna justify about it. 

I always love QT's films and the duration doesn't matter to me. 99 mins it says, but instead of a bank robbery scenario they were explaining how they got into the robbery and have these weird colour names. 

Don't be mad, I saw usual suspects. In that, from the narration to the twist & start to the end was so good and engaging. But, here the twist was good but they made it like the twist has no value and still he was shot. More like the officer done his job but in a bad way. I'm not comparing but I was expecting that and I beleive it was a bare minimum according to this plot.

I'm not opposing or questioning about QT's work, it's just it would've been great if it was done this way. I deeply agree that they didn't ignore the characters. Each of them has a specific value to travel till the end of the film except one or two. But something is off and I couldn't sense it exactly. 

Idk why QT slightly went to emotional part between Larry & Freddy. If joe proved it that Freddy was the imposter without the instinct shit it, perfect! Unfortunately they all died for nothing. Pink is the guy who has the brain (iykyk). 

Excellent plot, goated crew members, nice imposter & half baked screen play. For me this is it. Idhu enaku personal ah connect agala and screen play flaw evalo affect pannum nu elaruku theriyum. So yea, a decent film Imo.

Name: Obsession
Review: Obsession is a film which disturbs you a lot that you are gonna watch rhymes before bed especially when you watch it at night (no fucking exaggeration). I'm damn sure that the “about” of the film is the entire thing... The genre is horror and IMO it was scary enough when you watch it in great sound effects & louder audio. But horror & thriller would be the right genre to choose. Still, many plus points are there which elevates this film. 1. The thing he wished for, was recieved exactly. Nothing more or less. (Perfect Title) 2. Apart from the boy friend Pov, she only wants him. So, if she sees him doing something that upsets her, she either hurt herself or hurt others. 3. Insane disorder or indirect black magic, The loop was broken and you saw a Tragedy. Jump scares were less but the acting by the female lead was excellent. Her expression, energy, character adaptation everything was perfect.. May be they could've been inserted so much of jump scares rather than scaring us normally. I would've been satisfied, they got reasons. Goddamn it was so scaryy.. No noticable flaw in this film, may be they could've extended a bit. But this feels fine too. I recommend you to watch it in theatres than at home...

Name: Catch Me If You Can
Review:
Check Forgery ? That's interesting... 

The film definitely runs like a cat & mouse game between Dicaprio & Hanks. I don't know why, but I felt like Hanks character was so subtle to read. I mean he's not desperate, he loves his job. 

In this film everything has a connection, tom hanks got divorced & Frank abignale got divorced. I think that's why Leo had a good attachment with hanks. Uk what I mean !!

Well we can't rewrite an autobiography, but I feel it's a little lengthy for a plot like this. I don't have any opposition against the screen play. Fantastic work on it, but few scenes can be shortened to make it perfect & crisp. It's just my POV and apart from this I enjoyed the film. I really did..

Dicaprio's acting was best of all. Tom hanks had the best dialogues in the film. It's a perfect stake ig. And also Mr.Abignale father of Abignale jr has also done a great job when we speak about dialogues.

On overall, it's a good autobiography film with excellent leads, amazing plot & screen play with slightly extended run time...

Name: Me Before You
Review: It is what it is... This film ain't a rom com, it's purely a drama. Even though Love is a part of this film, still it's a drama. Speaking about the love I'm not talking about patrick & louisa. If I remove Patrick this film gets even better. Idk why, I feel like he's a looser. Can't do what his gf likes and judging her so quick. Whatever she does is to make Will happy unless she crosses the limit. All he care about his goddamn fitness. I mean who tf gives a dollar with his name. Bro she is your gf and you have to gift her what she really likes. Fucking Idiot !!! It's not about love or cheating, it's about Will Traynor accepts his fate and wishes that no one should be in pain because of him. For that louisa supporting him. Ofc she kissed him, but it's after the break up. She could've broke up with Patrick & then she can do what she wants with Will. It's alright love is blind. Little spoiler alert !!! I never knew ppl has rights to die under rules & regulations. He chose that and he accomplished. This is the most mature thing I have ever seen. Despite louisa clark attachment he already agreed that decision. So it's safe to say he did that coz he doesn't want to live and parents should not suffer with him. On overall it's a nice film except the tragedy. The screen play moves like a wind. Gentle music & genuine dialogues. It's worth of my time...

Name: Parandhu Po
Review: Sometimes you have to watch a movie and not a film. Parandhu po is a movie that entertains with lot of idioms. Kaal pokku la edutha padam nu solalam. Enakku indha padam andha alavuku connect aagala, because I spent a lot of time with my parents back in that age. May be that's the reason. Andha Anbu character ah konjam exaggerate panirundhalum that's a bittersweet reality in this generation and it might create an impact. That's what director Ram thinks. Ott ku idhu oru nalla padam...👍

Name: The Prestige
Review: I always wondering, how Nolan writes the script with this much of ideas & directs it even better... The point is they aren't asking “are you watching closely” for the magic trick. They are asking what Nolan did in the entire film. The subtle point of Nolan's work is, he always has a reason & purpose to do it. He doesn't go with the extraordinary, he goes with the ordinary and that's why we can able to enjoy the twists. Two Magicians fighting for magic & fame. One is natural talent and other is a hard worker. One did the magic and the other did the physics. Some may say magic is illusion, some may say magic is physics. He did mentioned a thing about magic, only wizards can do real magic and we are pretending to be magicians. I think at that moment he literally gave us the clue for Christian Bale's magic trick & even micheal caine said it directly. Not in magic but, we've been affected by lot of expectations. In reality it is Ordinary. Actually that's fine for Cinema to enjoy the work of art, not in real life. I'm not mentioning any spoilers around here, better you go and watch it. Honestly I feel like at that time of period nolan casually dropped a banger ig. Excellent work fr! Again “are you watching closely” !? ✨🎩

Name: La La Land
Review: Here's to the fools who really Love... I literally just blacked out like, what the fuck was that !? It was supposed to be a musical /romance ahh film. Why it was suddenly changed into horror !? I agree the situation is complicated and that's normal in a relationship. But she showed her true colours. So if she becomes a star, she won't marry the guy who was the reason, even after she said “I'm always gonna love you”, Seriously?? that's not funny !!! Ryan literally cried so hard that he had to convert his tears into a positive music to let go the nightmare by changing the whole damn thing into his version so that, he could live happily one last time with Emma. One of the best Bittersweet Climax I've ever seen. Sebastian, you are the best! On overall the film is really nice, but I didn't thought it would end this way. One side this film deserves appreciation & other side I'm dying right now! 🥀

Name: Rifle Club
Review:
Don't wague your tail here kiddo... 

Wow! Like I always said Malayalam movies are always fresh in concept & sparkling in the screen play.

Not a bad plot here, it's just a classic gun fight film between a club & rich gang, who is pretending to be a gangster. 

Although it feels one sided, it was quite entertaining. Idk whether they are gonna take a sequence for this. If they does I'll be watching it in theatres. 

On overall, it's a good film which gives you a energy & enjoyment at the same time...

Name: Pulp Fiction
Review: Before starting the review I wanted to say this film was not my cup of tea. This is one feels so much different than the other Tarantino films. Well they started the film with the normal conversation in a random coffee shop discussing about the crimes & robbery to proceed the film by giving a hint it will based on it. Pretty excited when he literally came up with the chapters and non linear shit. But it didn't, that's the point. I mean the 2nd chapter & the last chapter did impress me. We got two special fucking awesome cameos back to back. Still some shit is missing & it shouldn't be in QT's film. Well I don't have much to say, but you have to set up a mood to watch this & only thing you wouldn't regret is , at least it's not a slow burner. I wasn't expecting anything in particular but it was so predictable that it's gonna end like a circle. And, it did....

Name: Aaranya Kaandam
Review:
Thiagarajan Kumararaja has clearly said the Morality of the film earlier. 

Not everyone wants everything, they just want a simple changeover that led them to a peaceful life. You know why they were all running because that how the world works.

They didn't run for life, they run to chase the life that they dreamed to live. I say, it's a Wonderful portrayal by him.

You know what's more shocking in the film and natural in reality !? A middle age girl playing wonderful mind games by using men as bait. A very subtle play by the female character with her innocent appearance & dumb expectations. I mean nobody gets any clue what is gonna be and I like that.

Only flaw for me in this film is Background scores. Individually it shines but with movie presence it was not good. However the usage was not that much unlike the characters so it doesn't seem like a big cost. Also the characters, it's peak. Proper usage for sure I mean they didn't hesitate just after the hype it was all in the package like I expected coz I trust old movies. So nothing feels really different or fresh at the same time it felt good and that's what matters to me. 

On overall it's really a perfectly rated film & the genre was perfectly fine. (One more flaw by personal side, neraya bad words ah mute la potutanga so I missed some raw conversation & arguments, still it's fine) ...

Name: Backrooms
Review: You just don't belong here... Backrooms, the title itself gives you a clue about something which creates a curiosity for nothing. It's basically a game and from that inspiration the film was took. But, was it a same shit ?? Absolutely NOT !!! In 2022 , the short film of backrooms came out like a footage view. NGL it boosted up my expectations even higher. Turns down it was a bit disappointment to me after the theatrical experience. In terms of horror genre, they really did a great job and I was really impressed like how they move up the screen play with different reactions on the scenario basis. Sound effects were so loud & scary. More like jump scare without face-off. In terms of plot, it's really a half baked shit. Clearly we can say the details are not clear & not enough. It's like you are talking some shit and slowly you are trying to move with the story suddenly it ends with some unexpected horror shit. Not a fucking clue about it and I was thinking how tf I have to react to this shit !?? Here, I'm not expecting a logic or something relevant by comparing with the physics and talking some shit. I demand a fucking explanation that how the Backrooms are created & how you entered into it ? Who are the doctors ? Why the man I saw earlier who tried to kill me, just sleeping like a homeless man & he looks small in height why is all that !?? Is my question. And I don't recall that they answered any of that. At a point I wasn't even disappointed. I was so pissed about it, like why do they have to do this ?? My gosh gimme a break guys. Honestly, they better take Backrooms - 2 or I'm gonna flip out fs. On overall, they did a great job in horror & the screen play but they let me ask them where's the fucking plot !?? Medicore film IMO...

Name: Ocean's Twelve
Review:
I never thought Benedict would give deadline for ocean's eleven. 

I won't say it's better than ocean's eleven, but they some how pulled a decent screen play to push forward coz the plot was a continuation. But the gang was tuff as hell 🥀...

The heist was less in this movie but, they have shown all of people in the ocean's gang as funny & idiotic. NGL the humours were too subtle & clean executed at equal stake.

Yea it's a nice entertainer and also Brad Pitt was freaking awesome... ( I'm straight )

Name: Maaveeran
Review: வீரமே ஜெயம். Wow Remarkable Writing & direction by Madonne Ashwin ! It took 3 years to watch it although I wasn't interested for the past 2 years. This year I heard from someone this film is one of the best commercial pull in Kollywood. Even few weeks before my friend said watch it asap. 1 week before I wanted to give it a try but unfortunately Mx player wasn't working. Literally I was searching in every website but it was available in Hindi and not in tamil. I was like wtf !?? I almost gave up watching it. Today I was thinking, which film can I watch ? I saw Mx player and I thought of deleting it. Suddenly my mind changed and I wanted to give a last try. And, the rest is PEAK. What a freaking fucking commercial banger is this !?? I love commercial films I grew up watching it. At that time I wasn't biased about any actors or directors. If it is a commercial film , if the film is good then I'll be enjoying it very much. Let's talk about this film !! SK cooked his role perfectly. An actor who makes joke, being innocent, dealing emotional scenes like nothing, natural action sequence, not being hyped, lowkey a good dancer, subtle expressions, etc... I'm definitely standing for Sk on any basis coz he just chose this banger!!! Also Myskkin, he's fucking goated guys. He can do many negative roles. Mixture of comedy & being so rude makes him the best. He even dominating equally as SK in this film. ( Ena nanba, Maira nanba !! 😂) Basically SK + Myskkin + VJS voiceover is totally an amazing combo!!! Side characters were also good especially Aditi shankar. It may seem like she's existed but she was good as per her role. Saritha & Yogi Babu literally carried with the comedy part along with SK. Tbh they did even better than him. Saritha balanced the comedy & emotional part so well. It was perfect. On overall, it's totally a great film which no one should miss it. Hats off to the Madonne & his crew for this work. Before this year, Soon I'll be watching it again. முற்றும்.

Name: Hachi: A Dog's Tale
Review: Ohhhh Hachiii !!!! :((( Deep down everyone needs a soul like Hachi. We always wandering here & there for work or anything. But at the end of the day we will have 2 different souls will be waiting for us. One is family & other is our pet. The bond between Wilson & Hachi was literally the best thing among humans & dogs that I've ever seen. I always wanted a puppy to pet from my little age. But my mom won't allow to have dogs. In the future atleast I'll pet a cute Akita & I'll name him Hachi. I'm so much greatful for this film & I owe a thank you for my friend who suggested me to watch it. So yea a wonderful film which hugs your heart & says it's okay you are alright... 🥺❤️‍🩹

Name: Brothers
Review: Why Tobey !? “Brothers” !! I think the title of the film is slightly far away from the film. Even though the one part of the story was to take responsibility by either of the brother. It was mostly about how Tobey suffers & survives and how he comes out of the trauma he faced. One faces criticism & regains with some good deeds & the other gets respect but ended up with a traumatic experience & his life becomes miserable turning him into a mayhem state. Still this film didn't convince me enough to like it. It's mid guys !!! 🙏
